properties.name: app.security.api.enabled
properties.description: Whether Open API support is enabled in the application.

properties.name: app.security.api.open-endpoints
properties.description: List of endpoints that are accessible without authentication.

properties.name: app.security.api.open-endpoints[].description
properties.description: Optional description of the endpoint for documentation purposes.

properties.name: app.security.api.open-endpoints[].enabled
properties.description: Whether this endpoint is enabled. Disabled endpoints are ignored by the security matcher.

properties.name: app.security.api.open-endpoints[].methods
properties.description: HTTP methods allowed for this endpoint. Default is ALL methods if omitted or empty.

properties.name: app.security.api.open-endpoints[].path
properties.description: Path pattern of the endpoint. Supports wildcards (/**).
